name: Bug Resolution Program Supervisor
outcome_goal: Freeze the current bug backlog into one coordination artifact, review the authority blockers, materialize bounded packet specs, and open wave tracking for the bug-resolution program.
anti_requirements: Do NOT treat new bugs after kickoff as part of this frozen program unless they are regressions caused by the program itself.
Do NOT resolve FIXED without validates_fix evidence.
Do NOT move bug authority into ad hoc SQL or sidecar spreadsheets.
Do NOT launch more than five concurrent execution lanes from the materialized packets.

jobs.label: freeze_bug_backlog
jobs.description: Capture the kickoff bug snapshot and lane mapping from the live bug surfaces.
jobs.outcome_goal: Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/bug_resolution_program_kickoff_20260423.json exists and records either a frozen snapshot or a precise authority blocker state.
jobs.prompt:
From the repo root supplied by the runtime workdir, run:

```bash
python3 scripts/bug_resolution_program.py freeze --program-id bug_resolution_program_20260423 --output Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/bug_resolution_program_kickoff_20260423.json
```

If the resulting coordination file has `coordination_state != "frozen"`, do not pretend the program is ready. Write `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/WAVE0_BLOCKED_20260423.md` explaining which authority probes failed and why the backlog could not be frozen yet.

Do not edit runtime code in this job.

jobs.label: review_wave_zero_gate
jobs.description: Review the coordination file and spell out the exact Wave 0 authority exit gate.
jobs.outcome_goal: A short review artifact names the blocking bugs, exact gate checks, and what must pass before broad packet execution begins.
jobs.prompt:
Read `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/bug_resolution_program_kickoff_20260423.json`.

Write `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/WAVE0_GATE_20260423.md` with:
1. Current coordination state
2. Authority probes and pass/fail result
3. Wave 0 packets or blocking bugs
4. Exact exit gate for moving to Wave 1
5. Residual risks if the team skips authority repair

Keep it grounded in the coordination file; do not invent backlog details that are not in the artifact.

jobs.label: materialize_packet_specs
jobs.description: Render bounded packet specs from the frozen coordination file.
jobs.outcome_goal: One `.queue.json` file exists per packet under Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/ when the coordination file is frozen.
jobs.prompt:
Read `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/bug_resolution_program_kickoff_20260423.json` first.

If `coordination_state == "frozen"`, run:

```bash
python3 scripts/bug_resolution_program.py materialize-packets --coordination Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/bug_resolution_program_kickoff_20260423.json --template Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program_packet_template_20260423.queue.json --output-dir Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets
```

If the coordination file is blocked instead of frozen, write `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/PACKET_MATERIALIZATION_BLOCKED_20260423.md` explaining why packet generation was intentionally skipped.

Do not hand-author packet specs that disagree with the coordination file.

jobs.label: open_wave_tracking
jobs.description: Open the first wave tracker for the bug-resolution program and record the handoff state.
jobs.outcome_goal: A wave tracking artifact records whether Wave 0 was opened, which packet specs exist, and what remains blocked for later waves.
jobs.prompt:
Read:
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/bug_resolution_program_kickoff_20260423.json`
- `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/WAVE0_GATE_20260423.md`

If the coordination file is frozen, start Wave 0 tracking:

```bash
python3 scripts/bug_resolution_program.py open-wave --wave-id bug_resolution_program_20260423.wave_0_authority_repair --coordination Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/bug_resolution_program_kickoff_20260423.json
```

Then write `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/WAVE_TRACKING_20260423.md` with:
1. Whether Wave 0 tracking was opened
2. Packet specs available by wave
3. Exact dependency line for Waves 1-3
4. The command operators should run next

If the coordination file is blocked, record that clearly instead of claiming the wave was opened.
